start.speaker: Watchful
start.text: You have climbed the hard hill. Come in and rest without apology. Below lies the Valley of Humiliation, where accusation wounds those who enter unarmed.

choices.text: I am weary. I will receive rest as provision, not failure.
Tell me how to enter the valley without trusting myself.

armour.speaker: Watchful
armour.text: Take the armour kept for pilgrims: faith for the front of you, promise for the dark around you, and humility for the accusations behind you. Stand, and do not flee.

choices.text: I take it up, because I will need grace in the fight.
